query: UPDATE categories SET image = 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663029238813/yZFAUgcpmHrhNSfI.jpg' WHERE nameEn LIKE '%Dried%' OR nameAr LIKE '%جاف%'; UPDATE categories SET image = 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663029238813/hrfAWvrAEQSqvIcJ.jpg' WHERE nameEn LIKE '%Ice%' OR nameAr LIKE '%آيس%'; UPDATE categories SET image = 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663029238813/KdvkdMNSJEKgyFkz.jpg' WHERE nameEn LIKE '%Chip%' OR nameAr LIKE '%رقائق%'; UPDATE categories SET image = 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663029238813/iURdCkutzgfBJEmt.jpg' WHERE nameEn LIKE '%Cookie%' OR nameAr LIKE '%بسكويت%'
